V-M-008.checks: Background jobs do not auto-assign complimentary internal access or mutate manually managed clients unexpectedly. Subscription expiry task correctly deactivates expired subscriptions and decrements server.current_clients counter. Daily cleanup and configurable anti-abuse handshake detection tasks run without errors.
V-M-008.commands: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_scheduler.py -v

scenarios.scenario: Handshake anomaly job interval is configured from ANTI_ABUSE_SCAN_INTERVAL_SECONDS
